stories.title: Cameron Young Holds 5-Shot Lead at Doral — 36-Hole Record Pace on Blue Monster's Return

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Cameron Young is on FIRE at Doral.

After 36 holes: -13 (64-67). Five-shot lead.

T2: Spieth, Nick Taylor, Smalley all at -8.
Scheffler at -6.

Round 3 final pairing: Young + Taylor at 1:35 PM ET.

#GolfFanrecap #CadillacChampionship

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Can Cameron Young hold a FIVE-SHOT LEAD on moving day at the Blue Monster?

R3 is underway at Trump National Doral. Final pairing tips at 1:35 PM ET.

Scheffler is 7 back. Spieth is 5 back. This could still get interesting.

#GolfFanrecap #CadillacChampionship

article.headline: Cameron Young Leads Cadillac Championship by Five — 13-Under Heading Into Moving Day at Doral

stories.title: Korda and Do Co-Lead LPGA Mexico at 9 Under — World No. 345 Stuns Tour

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
World No. 1 vs. World No. 345.

Nelly Korda and Brianna Do are TIED for the lead at the LPGA Riviera Maya Open at -9.

Korda: bogey-free 67 in R2.
Do: the most unlikely co-leader of the season.

R3 is today. #GolfFanrecap #RivieraMayaOpen

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Nelly Korda. Still hunting.

R3 is underway at El Camaleon in Mexico. Korda and Brianna Do both at -9 entering today.

Korda's 2026 dominance has been called "the best she's ever been."

Watch it unfold. #GolfFanrecap #LPGA

article.headline: Korda and Do Share LPGA Mexico Lead at 9-Under — World No. 345 Stuns at Riviera Maya Open

stories.title: LIV Golf's Existential Crisis — PIF Ends Saudi Funding, Players Call PGA Tour

x_posts.label: Post 3-1
x_posts.text:
MAJOR GOLF NEWS: Saudi Arabia's PIF is pulling LIV Golf funding after 2026.

Yasir Al-Rumayyan stepping down as chairman. New board named.

Multiple LIV players' reps have already contacted the PGA Tour about returning.

The Saudi era of golf is ending. #GolfFanrecap

x_posts.label: Post 3-2
x_posts.text:
Where do LIV Golf players go from here?

PIF funding ends after 2026. No Returning Member Program. Terms for return: more restrictive.

But multiple reps have called PGA Tour. The dam has broken.

Golf's civil war may finally be ending. #GolfFanrecap

article.headline: LIV Golf's Existential Moment — Saudi Arabia Ends Funding After 2026, Players Call PGA Tour

stories.title: Scheffler's Doral Charge — From Stumbling R1 to T6 After R2, Can World No. 1 Rally?

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Scottie Scheffler is 7 shots back at Doral. He opened with a 71. He's the world No. 1.

He came back with a 67 Friday. Now at -6, T6.

Seven shots is a lot. But it's Scheffler. And it's moving day.

#GolfFanrecap #CadillacChampionship

article.headline: Scheffler's Doral Charge — World No. 1 at 6-Under After R2, Seven Back of Young Heading Into Moving Day

stories.title: Brianna Do's Cinderella Story — World No. 345 Shares LPGA Lead With Korda

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Brianna Do is world No. 345 on the LPGA Tour.

Nelly Korda is No. 1.

They are TIED for the lead at -9 in Mexico.

This is the most unlikely golf leaderboard of the year. Today is moving day.

#GolfFanrecap #LPGA

article.headline: Brianna Do's Cinderella Story — World No. 345 Shares LPGA Lead With Korda at Riviera Maya Open
